rows.label: tlk47100041_05_msg0001
rows.name:
The port's packed with people now~
No one gets a moment to breathe.

rows.label: tlk47100041_05_msg0002
rows.name:
Acedians who rarely come here,
and even Superbians
who were supposed to be at war...

rows.label: tlk47100041_05_msg0003
rows.name:
In the end, when people
can't handle things alone,
they have to rely on others.

rows.label: tlk47100041_05_msg0004
rows.name:
Now then, once this chaos ends,
can people keep holding hands?
